caption:
Since 1 July, a Chennai builder who lies about your completion date, carpet area, or amenities in an ad can be fined up to ₹5 lakh per instance. Every ad must now carry a scannable QR code. Swipe for the five things it has to show you — and the one to scan before you trust a single claim.

https://intel.terrem.in/markets?utm_source=instagram&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=chennai-completion-ad-ban
